saturated_angles: Linear chapter-summary narration that merely retells chapter 1, then chapter 2, then chapter 3.
Generic rejected-mate revenge framing that reveals Sterling identity, fake death, or later laboratory attacks too early.
Overly romantic triangle framing that softens Lucien's abandonment and coercion.
underserved_gaps: A compact one-arc mini-drama centered on the exact moment Evelyn stops begging the old family to choose her.
A visual emphasis on public power symbols: helicopter, warning tape, Luna blanket, child charm, ring, and burning letter.
A still-led comic recap that uses speech bubbles sparingly for the cruelest lines instead of relying on image text.

data_points.claim: Arc 0101 begins with a blizzard mountain collapse where Evelyn protects medical supplies and gets her right hand pinned under rock.
data_points.usable_as: opening hook and first hero frame

data_points.claim: Lucien publicly chooses Seraphina first and says Evelyn can reach the shelter line herself.
At the shelter, Seraphina wears the black-and-gold wolf blanket reserved for the Luna while Evelyn is kept outside warning tape.
Caspian hides behind Seraphina and gives her the charm meant for his mother, deepening Evelyn's sense of replacement.
Evelyn hears Lucien minimize her potential hand microsurgery as not important if she can still stay in the Manor.
Evelyn writes the severance request with her left hand, removes the Luna ring, and moves out of the master suite.
Lucien burns the severance letter without reading it and declares Blackthorn Pack has no discarded Luna.

common_questions: Why did Lucien save Seraphina first when Evelyn was the one badly injured?
How does Evelyn finally stop waiting for her family to choose her?
What keeps Evelyn trapped after she signs the severance request?

misconceptions.myth: This arc should reveal the later Sterling comeback to feel satisfying.
misconceptions.reality: The arc ending is psychological severance, not public revenge; later identity reveals are protected future material.

misconceptions.myth: The Pack should be shown with wolf transformations or fantasy species visuals.
misconceptions.reality: The setting uses Alpha/Luna/Pack as power labels in a modern luxury world; wolf transformations are explicitly forbidden.

misconceptions.myth: One chapter should become one video.
misconceptions.reality: The pipeline contract is one complete arc per video; chapters are evidence and texture, not the output unit.

audience_insights.knowledge_level: Target viewers understand rejected mate, cold husband, green-tea rival, and revenge-return tropes; the video must quickly clarify this world uses modern elite Pack power rather than animal transformation fantasy.
pain_points: Viewers want immediate proof that the betrayal is not a misunderstanding.
They need the child rejection to land without turning the recap into an audiobook.
They expect a final hook that promises escape and future payoff without spoiling later arcs.

angles_discovered.name: He Chose Her First
angles_discovered.hook: He saved his mistress first, then told his bleeding Luna to walk back alone.
angles_discovered.why_now: The primary-source chapter opens on public abandonment, the cleanest one-line betrayal for short-form recap.

angles_discovered.name: The Replacement Was Already Waiting
angles_discovered.hook: By the time Evelyn survived the mountain, another woman was already wearing her Luna blanket.
angles_discovered.why_now: The black-and-gold blanket gives the arc a concrete visual symbol of identity theft.

angles_discovered.name: She Signed With Her Broken Life
angles_discovered.hook: With one hand crushed, Evelyn used the other to end the bond.
angles_discovered.why_now: The left-hand severance request offers a compact transformation beat from victimhood to agency.

visual_references.description: User-provided character sheet for Evelyn, Lucien, and Seraphina.
visual_references.what_works: Provides stable faces, proportions, wardrobe class signals, and comic-book reference continuity for the three central adults.

visual_references.description: Default Burned Luna, Crowned Queen visual style.
visual_references.what_works: Defines 9:16 modern American superhero comic style, luxury noir palette, hard cel shading, and no-text image constraints.

research_brief.research_summary: Arc 0101 is not a revenge payoff yet; it is the exact mini-story where Evelyn survives public abandonment, realizes her home has already replaced her, and makes the first real decision to leave even as Lucien proves he will not let her go peacefully.

arc_brief.title: Snowline Abandonment
arc_brief.book_title: The Luna He Left to Freeze

protected_future_arcs.protected: Seraphina invading the Pack medical center with stolen formula, destroying mother's manuscript, and Lucien locking Evelyn out of the lab.
Lucien freezing materials and budget, Seraphina destroying Evelyn's right-hand nerves with corrosive reagent, suppressed monitoring and testimony.
Fake re-signing of severance papers, birthday banquet public mother claim, Caspian forcing Lucien to divorce Evelyn.

bottom_card_protections: Evelyn's research strength may only be hinted.
External protection forces remain fully hidden.
Fake death and identity-switch route remain fully hidden.
Sterling family identity line remains fully hidden.
arc_brief.arc_start: Blizzard mountain collapse; Evelyn's right hand is crushed while Lucien publicly saves Seraphina first.
arc_brief.arc_landing: Evelyn has not escaped, but her final illusion about husband, child, and Luna identity is uprooted; she begins active emotional and practical severance.

nodes.name: Snowline Abandonment
nodes.emotional_core: Evelyn realizes Lucien will not choose her even when her life and right hand are at risk.
nodes.extreme_expression: During a blizzard collapse, Lucien carries the lightly injured Seraphina onto the helicopter and leaves Evelyn pinned and bleeding in the snow.
nodes.iconic_frame: Evelyn half-kneels in red-stained snow while Lucien boards the helicopter with Seraphina in his arms.

nodes.name: Shelter Station Replacement
nodes.emotional_core: Before Evelyn can even recover, Seraphina occupies the public Luna position.
nodes.extreme_expression: Evelyn reaches the shelter and sees Seraphina wrapped in the black-and-gold wolf blanket reserved for the Luna.
nodes.iconic_frame: Warning tape separates bloodied Evelyn from Seraphina leaning against Lucien under bright shelter lights.

nodes.name: Rejected At Home
nodes.emotional_core: Evelyn survives and returns home, but Caspian treats her injury as something disgusting.
nodes.extreme_expression: Feverish and bandaged, she reaches for Caspian; he hides behind Seraphina and gives Seraphina the charm meant for his mother.
nodes.iconic_frame: Caspian clings to Seraphina while Evelyn stands with her left hand half-raised and her right hand bandaged.
nodes.payoff_anchor: wolf charm / medicine and blood smell

nodes.name: The Verdict Through The Door
nodes.emotional_core: Evelyn stops inventing excuses because Lucien personally reduces her injury to a practical inconvenience.
nodes.extreme_expression: Outside the study, she hears Lucien say her crushed hand is not important as long as she can remain in the Manor.
nodes.iconic_frame: Evelyn braces against the study wall while Lucien calmly tends to Seraphina inside.
nodes.payoff_anchor: not that important / study door gap

nodes.name: Cold Severance
nodes.emotional_core: The breakup becomes real when Evelyn acts quietly instead of begging for an explanation.
nodes.extreme_expression: With her left hand, she writes a severance request, removes the Luna ring, leaves the master suite, and packs only what is hers.
nodes.iconic_frame: The Luna ring and master key sit on the severance letter under a desk lamp.
nodes.payoff_anchor: Luna ring / severance letter / east guest room

nodes.name: The Fireplace Refusal
nodes.emotional_core: Lucien makes clear that one document cannot free her from a system built to keep her.
nodes.extreme_expression: He burns the severance letter without reading it and declares Blackthorn Pack has no discarded Luna.
nodes.iconic_frame: The letter blackens in the fireplace while Evelyn watches from the doorway shadow without crying.

chapter_beats.title: He Chose Her First
chapter_beats.freeze_frame: Seraphina leans in Lucien's arms under the Luna blanket while Evelyn stands outside warning tape with snow and blood on her hand.

chapter_beats.title: No Place Left
chapter_beats.freeze_frame: Evelyn braces against the cold wall outside Lucien's study while his not-important verdict repeats.

chapter_beats.title: Burn What Binds Me
chapter_beats.freeze_frame: The severance letter blackens in Lucien's fire while Evelyn stands in shadow with a new decision.

chapter_text_evidence.evidence: Final text confirms medical supplies, crushed right hand, helicopter choice, shelter-line survival, warning tape, Luna blanket, and exact Seraphina line.
Final text confirms fevered return, staff hesitation, Caspian hiding behind Seraphina, charm transfer, and Lucien minimizing microsurgery risk.
Final text confirms left-hand severance writing, Luna ring removal, old east guest room, Lucien burning the letter, and final escape vow.

must_show_moments: Blood on snow under rotor wash as Lucien carries Seraphina away.
Seraphina in the black-and-gold Luna blanket behind warning tape.
Caspian hiding behind Seraphina with the wolf charm.
Evelyn outside the study door hearing the not-important verdict.
Left-hand severance letter, Luna ring, and master suite key.
Fireplace burning the letter while Evelyn stands in shadow and chooses a non-peaceful exit.

dialogue_candidates.text: She can make it back to the shelter line herself.
dialogue_candidates.speaker: Lucien Draven

dialogue_candidates.text: You smell like medicine and blood.
dialogue_candidates.speaker: Caspian Draven

dialogue_candidates.text: As long as it doesn't stop her from staying in the Manor, it's not that important.
dialogue_candidates.speaker: Lucien Draven

dialogue_candidates.text: Blackthorn Pack has no discarded Luna.
dialogue_candidates.speaker: Lucien Draven

dialogue_candidates.text: Then I'll have to leave in a way you can't stop.
dialogue_candidates.speaker: Evelyn Ashford

hero_frame_candidates.frame: warning tape and Luna blanket replacement
ring and severance letter under desk lamp
fireplace letter burn with Evelyn in doorway shadow

compression_notes: Keep all six nodes, but combine n1+n2 into one opening sequence and n5+n6 into one final escalation sequence.
Use 8-10 scenes for a 90-second runtime; avoid one scene per chapter and avoid audiobook-style prose recitation.
Speech bubbles should carry only the cruelest lines; narration supplies connective tissue and emotional interpretation.
Do not reveal later lab invasion, hand-destruction by reagent, birthday mother claim, fake death, Sterling identity, or external allies.

character_references.usage: descriptor provenance; do not render prompt labels in scene images

visual_style.style_core: Modern American superhero comic-book illustration style
visual_style.visual_style_block: 9:16 vertical modern American superhero comic-book illustration; semi-realistic adult proportions; thick outer ink contours; hard-edged cel shading; bold black shadow masses; modern luxury noir world; cold black, graphite gray, snow white, deep ocean blue with limited blood red and fire orange accents; strong contrast and vertical power imbalance; no image text, logos, watermarks, subtitles, wolf transformations, animal traits, medieval/fantasy, anime/webtoon, 3D, or live-action photorealism.
visual_style.asset_style_block: Modern American superhero comic-book character sheet style, prestige graphic novel cover finish, heroic semi-realistic adult proportions, angular facial planes, thicker outer contour lines, bold black spot shadows, high-contrast cel shading, dramatic rim light, modern luxury noir palette, clearly non-photorealistic, no text, no labels, no watermark.
visual_style.palette: cold black, graphite gray, snow white, deep ocean blue; supporting medical cold blue, old gold, ivory; accents blood red, fire orange, alarm red, cold silver
visual_style.lighting: cold white diffuse light for blizzard/shelter/medical moments; warm gold plus deep shadows for manor and study; fire orange only at the fireplace climax
visual_style.camera_language: vertical dramatic tension, close-ups/medium close-ups for humiliation and regret, low angles for power pressure, high angles for trapped Evelyn, slow push-in and fixed stare motion
visual_style.global_negative: no image text, watermarks, logos, subtitles, gibberish screen text, wolf transformations, animal ears/tails/claws, fantasy magic, medieval castles, ancient costume, steampunk, cyberpunk, school youth, rural pastoral, Japanese/Korean webtoon, chibi, 3D cartoon, live-action photo realism, primitive-tribe Pack, wrong-era objects, excessive gore, nudity, vulgar seduction, action-blockbuster treatment

cost_snapshot.notes: Pre-production only; no generation or render executed.
